document.title: FCC 15B Test Report
standards: FCC Part 15, Subpart B, Class B

sourceSummary.oneLine: FCC Part 15 Subpart B Class B emission test report for Laird Connectivity ST60/SU60 802.11 and Bluetooth 4.2 module models, with ST60-2230C selected as representative.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents conducted and radiated emissions evaluation against FCC Part 15 Subpart B Class B requirements.
keyPoints: Report No. FD740701-19, Rev. 01, was issued as a duplicate report to original report no. FD740701.
The tested representative model was ST60-2230C.
Conducted emissions and radiated emissions were reported as Pass.
Testing laboratory was International Certification Corporation with FCC Designation No. TW1073 and FCC site registration No. 933633.

entities.name: FCC
entities.evidence: Standard : FCC Part 15, Subpart B, Class B

concepts.name: FCC Part 15 Subpart B Class B
concepts.evidence: Standard : FCC Part 15, Subpart B, Class B

concepts.name: Conducted Emissions
concepts.evidence: 15.107 FCC Part 15, Subpart B, Class B Conducted Emissions Under limit 11.06dB @ 0.160MHz. Pass

concepts.name: Radiated Emissions
concepts.evidence: 15.109 FCC Part 15, Subpart B, Class B Radiated Emissions Under limit 3.52dB @ 44.55MHz. Pass

concepts.name: Duplicate test report
concepts.evidence: This report is issued as a duplicate report to original report no. FD740701. The modifications are changing brand name and applicant.

concepts.name: Measurement uncertainty
concepts.evidence: The measurement uncertainties given below are based on a 95% confidence level (based on a coverage factor (k=2)).

evidence.claim: The document is FCC 15B Test Report No. FD740701-19, Rev. 01.
evidence.evidenceText:
Report No.: FD740701-19 Page : 1 of 24
Report Version: Rev. 01
FCC 15B Test Report

evidence.claim: The equipment is an 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n + Bluetooth 4.2 module.
The model number identified on the cover page is ST60-2230C.
The brand name is Laird Connectivity and the applicant is Laird Connectivity LLC.
evidence.evidenceText:
Brand Name : Laird Connectivity
Applicant : Laird Connectivity LLC

evidence.claim: The applicable standard on the cover page is FCC Part 15, Subpart B, Class B.
evidence.evidenceText: Standard : FCC Part 15, Subpart B, Class B

evidence.claim: The report was initially issued on Nov. 28, 2023.
The report is a duplicate of original report no. FD740701 with modifications changing brand name and applicant.
evidence.evidenceText: This report is issued as a duplicate report to original report no. FD740701. The modifications are changing brand name and applicant.

evidence.claim: The product models provided to the EUT are ST60-SIPT, SU60-SIPT, ST60-2230C, and SU60-2230C.
evidence.evidenceText:
Brand Name Model Name Product Name Description
Laird Connectivity
ST60-SIPT 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n +
Bluetooth 4.2 module SIPT only
For marketing purpose
SU60-SIPT
ST60-2230C 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n M.2 2230
+ Bluetooth 4.2 module
with carrier
board
SU60-2230C

evidence.claim: ST60-2230C was selected as the representative model for final testing.
evidence.evidenceText: The above models, model ST60-2230C was selected as a representative one for the final test and only its data was recorded in this report.

evidence.claim: Testing applied standards include FCC Part 15, Subpart B, Class B and ANSI C63.4:2014.
evidence.evidenceText:
According to the specifications of the manufacturer, the EUT must comply with the requirements of the following standards:
FCC Part 15, Subpart B, Class B
ANSI C63.4:2014

evidence.claim: Conducted emissions under FCC Part 15 Subpart B Class B passed with an under-limit result of 11.06 dB at 0.160 MHz.
evidence.evidenceText: 15.107 FCC Part 15, Subpart B, Class B Conducted Emissions Under limit 11.06dB @ 0.160MHz. Pass

evidence.claim: Radiated emissions under FCC Part 15 Subpart B Class B passed with an under-limit result of 3.52 dB at 44.55 MHz.
evidence.evidenceText: 15.109 FCC Part 15, Subpart B, Class B Radiated Emissions Under limit 3.52dB @ 44.55MHz. Pass

evidence.claim: The test laboratory was International Certification Corporation at test sites CO01-WS and 03CH02-WS.
evidence.evidenceText:
Test Laboratory International Certification Corporation
Test Site CO01-WS, 03CH02-WS

evidence.claim: The test facility lists FCC Designation No. TW1073 and FCC site registration No. 933633.
evidence.evidenceText:
FCC Designation No.: TW1073
FCC site registration No.: 933633

evidence.claim: No deviation from the test standard and measurement procedure was reported.
evidence.evidenceText:
1.4 Deviation from Test Standard and Measurement Procedure
None

reviewFlags.reason: Conflicting tested-date evidence: cover page states Tested Date May 13 ~ May 16, 2017, while test equipment sections list Tested Date May 18, 2017.
Source metadata authoritySignal is general, but the document text identifies FCC Part 15, Subpart B, Class B as the applicable standard.
